name: Trendline Adult Cat Food – Salmon 1kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural cat food with salmon protein, brewer’s yeast for immune support, Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed and taurine. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats.
description: Trendline Adult Cat Food -Salmon , fully balanced all-natural cat food with fish protein, brewer’s yeast for immune support, Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed and taurine. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein …………………………….. 27% Fat …………………………………….10% Crude Ash ……………………………8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ………….3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewers Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 – B2 – B3 (niacin) – B6 – B12 – B7 (biotin) – B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.  Key Benefits 27% Fish Protein – supports strong muscles and daily vitality. 10% Healthy Fats – promotes healthy skin and a silky, soft coat. Brewer’s Yeast & Taurine – strengthens immunity, supports vision, and promotes heart health. Omega-3 & -6 Fatty Acids – reduce inflammation and shedding while enhancing skin health. Irresistible Salmon Flavor – even the pickiest eaters will crave it. Feeding Guide For an adult cat (~4kg): feed 50–80g daily , adjusting based on activity level and age. Fresh water should always be available.
